qry:select.name: RedondeoA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.oi_parametro, ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'RedondeoA\' ')/ROWS/ROW
